headline: Zoetis Lawsuits Challenge Companion Animal Outlook Yet Valuation Screens As Undemanding
summary: Multiple class action lawsuits and legal investigations have been filed against Zoetis (NYSE:ZTS) regarding its disclosures about the Companion Animal segment. The actions focus on claims that Zoetis misled investors about weakening growth, competitive pressures, and veterinarian adoption trends for key products. Allegations also reference safety concerns and market share losses in major Companion Animal offerings. Zoetis focuses on animal health products and services, with its Companion...
